title: Raghav Chadha news highlights: Saurabh Bharadwaj alleges BJP actively promotes him, ‘he consistently hangs back’
description: Raghav Chadha news highlights: The Aam Aadmi Party (AAP) removed MP Raghav Chadha as the deputy leader of the party in the Rajya Sabha in a surprise move on Thursday and replaced him with another member of Parliament, Ashok Mittal.
